title: Images must have alternative text
summary: Add a concise, descriptive alt attribute (or alt="" if purely decorative).

code.title: Images must have alternative text
code.summary: Add a concise, descriptive alt attribute (or alt="" if purely decorative).
code.what_changed: Add a concise, descriptive alt attribute (or alt="" if purely decorative).
code.why: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation

improvement_summary: The redesigned version fixes 'Images must have alternative text'. Add a concise, descriptive alt attribute (or alt="" if purely decorative). This addresses a critical barrier and improves conformance with WCAG 1.1.1.
highlights: Resolves a critical issue mapped to WCAG 1.1.1
